title: Research Progress Checkpoint
description: Checkpoint and resume state for the market-research orchestrator chain runner. Tracks which chain was running, what project config+brief it used, and the status of every step. Written by the orchestrator at each checkpoint and read on resume.

chain_name.description: Name of the chain this progress is for (e.g., full-market-review, quick-competitor-review, evidence-only).

chain_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the chain file content at the time of the last run. Used to detect chain definition changes.

config_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the project config.json at the time of the last run. Used to detect configuration changes.

brief_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the project brief.md at the time of the last run. Used to detect brief changes.

last_run.description: ISO 8601 datetime with timezone of the last execution (e.g., 2026-06-20T14:30:00+08:00).

steps.description: Ordered list of steps for this chain. Each element tracks the execution state of one agent or action.

id.description: Step identifier matching the chain definition (e.g., market-researcher, product-normalizer, claim-verifier).

phase.description: Phase name this step belongs to (e.g., Research, Normalization, Verification, Audit, Report).

label.description: Human-readable step label for display (e.g., Market Research, Product Normalization, Claim Verification).

output.description: Expected output filename or path for the artifact this step produces. Use "not_applicable" if the step produces no file artifact.

output_valid.description: Whether the output file was validated successfully. Only meaningful when status is completed. Use absent or false to indicate validation not yet performed or failed.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the step finished execution. Present only when the step has been attempted (completed, failed, or skipped).

error.description: Error message or exception summary when status is failed. Use "unknown" if a failure occurred with no actionable error message. Absent when status is completed, skipped, or pending.
